title: RNA collection, cDNA conversion and qPCR (SH-SY5Y cells)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"4j1d9","text":"This protocol describes the isolation of RNA from SH-SY5Y cells and the subsequent conversion to cDNA for qPCR. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"88d7d","text":"NucleoSpin RNA plus kit: 740984.50, Macherey-Nagel","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3l1jh","text":"High-Capacity cDNA Revers Transcription Kit: 4368814, Thermo Fisher Scientific","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4fgru","text":"SYBR Green master mix: 04707516001, Roche","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Cells were seeded in 10 cm dishes and used for collection when reaching 70-80% confluency. ( e.g. 3 million cells for collection after 48:00:00 )
Convert RNA to cDNA using the High-Capacity cDNA Reverse Transcription Kit (4368814, Thermo Fisher Scientific).
Scrape and collect cells in PBS(-/-).
Spin down cells (450xg, 00:05:00 ).
Wash with PBS(-/-).
Remove medium.
Wash once with PBS (-/-).
Spin down cells (450xg, 00:05:00 ).
Remove supernatant.

Isolate RNA following the instructions of the NucleoSpin RNA Plus kit (740984.50, Macherey-Nagel). ! Use a separate, desinfected area to isolate RNA. Use filter tips and dedicated pipets for RNA work.
Determine the concentration and the purity of the isolated RNA using a Nanodrop spectrometer.
Prepare a 2x Mastermix: %s %s Volume (µl) Component 2 µl RT buffer 0,8 µl dNTPs (100 µM) 2 µl random primers (10x) 1 µl Multiscribe transcriptase (10u/µl) 4,2 µl AD
Prepare 5 µg RNA in 20 µl total volume (dilute with RNase free water).
Add 10 µl of the mastermix to 10 µl of the RNA dilution.
Perform a quick vortex and spin down using a table-top centrifuge.
Start program for RNA to cDNA conversion: %s %s Step 1 Step 2 Step 3 Step 4 Temp (°C) 25 37 85 4 Time 10 min 120 min 5 sec ∞
Prepare a ten-fold dilution of the cDNA samples in duplicates (5 µl cDNA per well). Include a negative control where the cDNA is exchanged by an equivalent volume of water.
Prepare a master mix containing per sample: 10 µl SYBR Green master mix (Roche) 1 µl of 5 µM forward primer 1 µl of 5 µM reverse primer 3 µl water
Add 15 µl of the master mix to each well.
Prepare a serial dilution of the sample that you choose as standard (1/5, 1/25, 1/125, 1/625, 1/3125). Include water as a negative control. Pipet in duplo in a 96-well plate (5 µl per well).
Start the qPCR reaction: 95 °C for 00:10:00 50 cycles at 95 °C for 00:00:10 55 °C for 00:00:30 95 °C for 00:01:00 Determine a melting curve from 55 to 95 °C.
Cover plate with a film and spin samples down.
creator: Stephanie Vrijsen
